Name: Elgato Key Light
Description: Control Elgato Key Light (on/off, brightness, color temperature) from your Ulanzi Deck.

Actions.Name: On / Off
Actions.Tooltip: Turn the Key Light on or off

Actions.Name: Brightness / Temperature
Actions.Tooltip: Rotate to adjust brightness, press and rotate for color temperature

Localization.ui_hint_manual: Pick a discovered light, or enter its IP manually.
Localization.ui_hint_dial: Rotate the dial to adjust brightness; press and rotate to adjust color temperature.
